summary: Iteration 21: Google Drive Integration Testing - All tests pass. Tested: 1) /api/drive/status returns connection status (connected: false when not connected), 2) /api/drive/connect returns Google OAuth authorization URL with correct params (client_id, redirect_uri, drive.file scope), 3) Documents page shows 'Drive verbinden' button with Google Drive icon when not connected, 4) Article view export dropdown has PDF and DOCX options, 5) PDF and DOCX exports trigger downloads correctly, 6) Standard document upload functionality preserved.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user marc.hansen@canusa.de and existing articles for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Drive integration tested. Note: Full OAuth flow (actual Google login/consent) cannot be tested automatically - only endpoint availability, OAuth redirect URL verification, and UI button visibility were tested. The /api/drive/files and /api/drive/folders endpoints correctly return 400 when Drive is not connected. Article export (PDF/DOCX) works correctly and triggers browser downloads.

backend_endpoints_tested: GET /api/drive/status - Returns {connected: false} when not connected
GET /api/drive/connect - Returns OAuth authorization URL to accounts.google.com
frontend_elements_tested: Drive verbinden button (data-testid='connect-google-drive') - visible with Google Drive icon
Export dropdown (data-testid='export-dropdown') - visible on article view
PDF export button (data-testid='export-pdf-btn') - triggers PDF download
DOCX export button (data-testid='export-docx-btn') - triggers DOCX download
Documents page elements - folder structure, upload button, header
google_drive_testing_notes.limitation: Cannot test complete OAuth flow as it requires actual Google account interaction
